//: basalt-ui shipped oxlint preset. Consumers extend this from their own .oxlintrc.json via the node_modules-relative path: { "extends": ["./node_modules/basalt-ui/configs/oxlint.json"] }. oxlint rejects bare specifiers, so the relative ./node_modules path is required. NOTE: oxlint `extends` is per-glob last-writer-wins for `no-restricted-imports` — a base ban does NOT merge into an override glob, so any ban that must also hold inside an override is duplicated into that override below.

paths.name: antd
paths.message: Use Mantine — antd is not part of the basalt-ui stack.

paths.name: @visx/tooltip
paths.message: Use ChartTooltip + TooltipHeader/Row/Body from basalt-ui charts primitives.

paths.name: framer-motion
paths.message: Import from 'motion/react', not the raw framer-motion package.

patterns.message: Direct @visx/* imports are only allowed inside the charts boundary (**/charts/**).

paths.name: @mantine/core
paths.message: charts must be Mantine-free — no Mantine imports allowed.

paths.name: @mantine/hooks
paths.message: charts must be Mantine-free — no Mantine imports allowed.

paths.name: @visx/tooltip
paths.message: Use ChartTooltip + TooltipHeader/Row/Body from basalt-ui charts primitives.

patterns.message: charts must be Mantine-free — no Mantine imports allowed.

paths.name: @mantine/core
paths.message: tokens must be Mantine-free — no Mantine imports allowed.

paths.name: @mantine/hooks
paths.message: tokens must be Mantine-free — no Mantine imports allowed.

patterns.message: tokens must be Mantine-free — no Mantine imports allowed.
Direct @visx/* imports are only allowed inside the charts boundary (**/charts/**).
